title: EV-DECON-PHASE2 honesty gate; MEPQ-004/005 registered; Option 2 MEPQ export; Mission E remains deferred

Reject invented radiator envelope (38.3 conflated with front overhang). Register MEPQ-004/005 (fuel strap holes; mid XMBR thickness). Select Option 2 — export consolidated MEPQ checklist. Option 1 (Mission F) already open as MISN-000006.
